units.title_sub: 确认物品归属 · 物主代词入门 · 失物招领

meta.grammar: 指示代词 · 物主代词

can_do: I can ask "Is this/that your...?" and answer "Yes, it is." / "No, it isn't."
I can use this / that / these / those correctly.
I can use possessive adjectives (my, your, his, her) and possessive pronouns (mine, yours, his, hers).
I can write a simple lost / found notice.

dialogue.scene: Ann 和 Tom 在教室捡到一些文具，正在寻找失主。

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.en: Hey, Ann! Look! Is this your ruler?
lines.speak: Hey, Ann! Look! Is this your ruler?
lines.cn: Tom: 嘿 Ann！看！这是你的尺子吗？

lines.speaker: Ann
lines.en: No, it isn't. My ruler is green. That one is blue.
lines.speak: No, it isn't. My ruler is green. That one is blue.
lines.cn: Ann: 不，它不是。我的尺子是绿色的。那把是蓝色的。

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.en: Oh, I see. Whose ruler is it?
lines.speak: Oh, I see. Whose ruler is it?
lines.cn: Tom: 哦，知道了。这是谁的尺子？

lines.speaker: Ann
lines.en: Maybe it's Mike's. He has a blue ruler.
lines.speak: Maybe it's Mike's. He has a blue ruler.
lines.cn: Ann: 可能是 Mike 的。他有一把蓝色尺子。

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.en: Oh yes, it is! Thanks, Tom.
lines.speak: Oh yes, it is! Thanks, Tom.
lines.cn: Mike: 哦，是的，是我的！谢了 Tom。

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.en: You're welcome. And Ann, are these your pencils?
lines.speak: You're welcome. And Ann, are these your pencils?
lines.cn: Tom: 不客气。Ann，这些是你的铅笔吗？

lines.speaker: Ann
lines.en: No, they aren't. Mine are yellow. Those are red.
lines.speak: No, they aren't. Mine are yellow. Those are red.
lines.cn: Ann: 不，不是。我的是黄色的。那些是红色的。

explanations:
1. Is this your ruler? → "这是你的尺子吗？" 一般疑问句，把 be 动词 (is/are) 提到句首。
回答：肯定 Yes, it is. / 否定 No, it isn't.
2. Whose → "谁的"，提问所有格。回答用名词所有格（Mike's）或物主代词（mine）。
3. Mine are yellow. → mine = my pencils，是名词性物主代词，后面不需要再跟名词。
4. You're welcome. → "不客气" 固定搭配，回应 Thank you / Thanks。

paragraphs.en: Is this your schoolbag? It's blue and white. There are two notebooks, a pencil case and a dictionary in it.
paragraphs.speak: Is this your schoolbag? It's blue and white. There are two notebooks, a pencil case and a dictionary in it.

paragraphs.en: Please call me at 358-7921. Ask for Mary.
paragraphs.speak: Please call me at 358-7921. Ask for Mary.

paragraphs.en: My watch is missing. It's black. My name "Jack" is on the back.
I must find it. E-mail me at jack@email.com.
A set of keys. Are these yours? Ask the teacher for them.

items.text: 📘 a set of 一串 / 一套

items.example: I need a pencil for the test.

items.trans: 我有一个新的蓝色书包。

items.example: Please look it up in the dictionary.
Write the new words in your notebook.
My pencil case is on the desk.

items.trans: 我必须找到我的学生证。

patterns.description: 用来确认近处 (this) 或远处 (that) 的物品归属。
examples: ➡ 回答：Yes, it is. / No, it isn't.

patterns.structure: Are these / those + 复数物品?
patterns.description: 复数形式，用来确认多个物品。
examples: ➡ 回答：Yes, they are. / No, they aren't.

patterns.structure: Please call / e-mail + 人 + at + 号码
patterns.description: 失物招领中留下的联系方式。
examples: ➡ call + 人 + at + 电话号码
➡ e-mail + 人 + at + 邮箱地址

grammar.title: 1️⃣ 指示代词：this / that / these / those
grammar.tip: 顺口溜：this these 近，that those 远。this that 后跟单数，these those 后跟复数。

grammar.title: 2️⃣ 物主代词：形容词性 vs 名词性

comparisons.text: This is my book. = This book is mine.
That is your pen. = That pen is yours.
Those are her pencils. = Those pencils are hers.

error_correction.wrong: She lost her pencil. This isn't her.
error_correction.wrong_speak: She lost her pencil. This isn't her.
error_correction.correct1: She lost her pencil. This isn't hers.
error_correction.c1_speak: She lost her pencil. This isn't hers.

grammar.title: 3️⃣ 名词所有格：'s

example.text: Mike's ruler（迈克的尺子） → the ruler is Mike's

rows.rule: 以 s 结尾的复数 + '

example.text: The teachers' office（老师们的办公室）

grammar.comparison:
Whose bag is this? → It's Mary's.
Whose keys are these? → They're my father's.

exercises.analysis: eraser 是名词，前面需要用形容词性物主代词 my。Mine 是名词性物主代词，不能修饰名词。
schoolbag 是单数名词，用 Is + this 提问；回答用 it 代替 this schoolbag。
pencils 是复数名词，需要用复数指示代词 these 或 those。句中 Are 提示是复数，these 表示近处。

exercises.body:
— Is that ____ eraser? (you)
— No, it isn't. ____ is white. (I)
exercises.analysis: 第一空后跟名词 eraser，用形容词性物主代词 your；第二空单独作主语（= my eraser），用名词性物主代词 Mine。

exercises.body: 连词成句：these / are / your / notebooks / ?
exercises.analysis: 一般疑问句以 be 动词开头，notebooks 是复数，用 Are。注意首字母大写和句末问号。
问"谁的"用 Whose。回答用名词所有格 Mike's = Mike's ruler。

exercises.body: 改错：This pens are mine. Those one is yours.
exercises.answer: These pens are mine. That one is yours.
exercises.analysis: pens 是复数，指示代词应该用复数 These；one 是单数，指示代词应该用单数 That。注意 this/that 后跟单数名词，these/those 后跟复数名词。

exercises.body:
根据上下文补全对话：
A: Look! I found a watch on the playground.
B: ____ watch is it?
A: I don't know. ____ you know?
B: Let me see. There's a name "Tom" on the back. Maybe it's ____.
A: Let's go and ask him.
exercises.analysis: 第一空问"谁的"用 Whose；第二空是问句，you 前需要助动词 Do；第三空表示"也许是他的"用名词性物主代词 his (= his watch)。

model_en.en: I lost my school ID card. It's blue and white. My name "Zhang Wei" is on it.
model_en.speak: I lost my school ID card. It's blue and white. My name 'Zhang Wei' is on it.

model_en.en: I must find it. Please call me at 139-1234-5678.
model_en.speak: I must find it. Please call me at 139-1234-5678.

writing.translation: 我丢失了学生证。它是蓝白色的，上面有我的名字"张伟"。我必须找到它。请致电 139-1234-5678。谢谢！

checklist: 我能分清 this/that/these/those 的区别，并正确使用
我理解形容词性物主代词(my/your/his/her) 和名词性物主代词(mine/yours/his/hers) 的区别
我能用 Is this/that…? 和 Are these/those…? 问句确认物品归属
我会用 Whose…? 提问"谁的"，并用 's 名词所有格回答
我能写一则英文失物招领启事
units.feynman_challenge: 用英语指着身边的物品，自问自答——"Is this my pen? No, it isn't. It's Tom's pen."

review.task: 口头自问自答物主代词
写一则完整的失物招领
复习所有物主代词表格

next_stop.desc: 下一单元你将学习用 Where 问物品的位置，使用介词 in / on / under 描述方位——这在失物招领场景中也会用到！
